## Testing

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`

## Privacy and Safety

- [ ] This keeps provider access local-first and read-only.
- [ ] This does not display full conversation bodies by default.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for any new provider paths or user-visible behavior.

## Provider Changes

Complete this section when adding or changing provider behavior:

- [ ] Provider ID and descriptor are updated.
- [ ] Local data paths and permissions are documented in `docs/privacy.md`.
- [ ] Missing files, permission failures, and schema drift return partial data or empty results instead of crashing.
- [ ] Fixture tests cover the parser or runtime detection path.
- [ ] README provider tables are updated in English and Chinese.

If this PR does not touch providers, write `N/A`.
